name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan introduces significant changes in the scope and methodology of the research. Specifically, it adds new tasks related to perturbation spectrum analysis (n_s, r), observational consistency with Planck data, and detailed reheating calculations (T_rh). While some tasks overlap with the old plan (dynamical system analysis, dynamical selection), the new plan requires a different, more integrated approach to these calculations (e.g., including alpha, calculating slow-roll parameters, and generating specific observational plots). Therefore, it is more efficient to restart the execution to ensure all data is generated consistently according to the new, more rigorous requirements.
